author: makortel
body:
To make it easier to evolve them in complex ways in the future.

#### PR description:

In response to https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/51500 this PR proposes to move the mentioned class templates into `io_v1` namespace to make it easier to provide EDProducer-based backwards compatibility for instantiations of these templates. This change would break backwards compatibility for the instantiations of these templates, that are found in the outputs of the DIGI and RECO steps of standard phase 2 workflows. So far that would impact the RelVals of 20_0_0_pre1 and 20_1_0_pre1, but _maybe_ that can be tolerated at this time (GEN-SIM, i.e. input for classical mixing, should be unaffected).

Unfortunately we didn't consider this kind of evolution of class templates during the EVOLUTION_X.

I suggest to review this PR with whitespace-only changes ignored.

Resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/51500

#### PR validation:

Code compiles

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

If this approach is accepted, to be backported to 20_0_X.
title: Move TTCluster, TTStub, TTClusterAssociationMap, TTStubAssociationMap, TTTrackAssociationMap class templates to io_v1 namespace
